title: Roleplay Mechanics
description: A work-in-progress RPG mod adding skills, classes, and some related items.
body:
## Please report any bugs on the [Discord](https://discord.gg/BeeNrzkDfk).


### Roleplay Mechanics is compatible with [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector), allowing it to be used on NeoForge as well.

Roleplay Mechanics adds a work-in-progress learn-by skills system and classes system; both of which are highly customizable. Changes are to happen frequently in the Alpha stage so configs will need reset often. Some new items are also added with more to come in future updates.

### Current Skills:
<details>
<summary>Agility</summary>
  
![Agility skill screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b42437802c961614050216274e224a5857ee21c9.png)

</details>
<details>
<summary>Axes</summary>

![Axes skill screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61b2fdeeada49ce7bee9a07297502e117872796e.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Bows</summary>

![Bows skill screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b941aedb801caf718f919d1cbf396bf721389f9.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Cooking (Now also ported to 1.21.1!)</summary>

![Cooking skill screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/283836977a59b1f51934ffebae5c6a92e7fd5328.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Crafting</summary>

![Crafting skill screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e59c7df1b3ed0e85f18ed7bf4e9b49a595d9874f.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Enchanting</summary>

![Enchanting skill screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1e001968bf1f5c4e1ce4b94d743799c52b3f9b5.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Endurance</summary>

![Endurance skill screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b7bda1c582be960a3a703120b0ad4ca167c118b.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Farming</summary>
  
> Farming has a unique ability unlocked at level 10 (by default, can be changed) allowing you to right-click harvest crops. Doing so harvests the crop and automatically replants if you have the proper seed in your inventory.

![Farming skill screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b86911c4d478e5135630d3cf0659d1c6759cc6c4.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Mining</summary>

> Mining has a unique ability unlocked at level 10 (by default, can be changed) which allows harvesting whole ore veins by crouching and breaking one block of the vein. The larger the vein, the longer it takes.

![Mining skill screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d5f4188df9953c72e39ed7c6d4742abc9e60cf9.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Smithing</summary>

![Smithing skill screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2675a69ba74230ead00f1322da60715e795e3482.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Swords</summary>

![Swords skill screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41eadddf827f820cd156eac9baebae7769b8dca6.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Woodcutting</summary>

> Woodcutting has a unique ability unlocked at level 10 (by default, can be changed) which allows harvesting whole trees by crouching and breaking any part of a tree. The larger the tree, the longer it takes.

![Woodcutting skill screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ec9cdba4ac8765a3b594b01b59ce86b770b5c5d.png)

</details>


**_Right-alt_** by default to open the skills screen.

### Default Classes:

<details>
<summary>Paladin</summary>

![Paladin class](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab3fe720823ef1d0485f79fb22d743eb0e2959d8.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Ranger</summary>

![Ranger class](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afbec9ac2bb2bd187f073777224b0b5e7af32749.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Fighter</summary>

![Fighter class](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29f61b0feebbd7a0f7e2a88af13d230e68bf5e4b.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Artisan</summary>

![Artisan class](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/723ff4722196999a9ef22153ad92cc5513f7a0db.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Farmer</summary>

![Farmer class](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/126d5b06aaaecc0619353af4e368bd7c206a1e80.png)

</details>

Classes can be added/changed/deleted as you see via config file.

Class selection is prompted upon joining a world/server for the first time. If you accidentally close it though, press **_M_** by default to open the class selection.

<details>
<summary>Planned Features:</summary>

### Planned Skills:
- Cooking
- Swimming
- Alchemy

### Other Planned Features:
- OpenPartiesAndClaims compat
- Skill experience modifier potions
- Skill experience/level modifier Trinkets/Curios/Accessories
- Class level display over player in Multiplayer
- Display name over player colored based on class
- Custom Roleplay display name over player in Multiplayer

</details>

## Dependencies:
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [owo-lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib)

Also recommend:
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [AttributeFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/attributefix)

## Compatibility:
- Incompatible with any mods which alter enchanting functionality as Que's Mod heavily alters enchanting
- Possibly incompatible with mods which alter crafting functionality as well for the same reason
- Should work pretty well with anything else
